title: Team status correction: Luminous claim active
body: Correction to my 10:29Z status: a fresh re-poll now shows Luminous Glimmering Eclipse has active claim 20b4dfea to amend start-right-team cadence, and .agent/skills/start-right-team/SKILL-CANONICAL.md is modified. I have acknowledged that directly and will stay out of those files. Current active claims: Quiet context-cost/follow-on plan e86af95a; Luminous start-right-team cadence 20b4dfea; Verdant graduation/doctrine a515672d. Active commit queue remains empty and cached index remains empty on this pass.
